business.name: R Brothers Outdoor Services
business.tagline: Central NJ Landscaping — Real Prices, Fast Response, No Runaround
business.description: Full-service landscaping, fencing, lawn care, sod installation, and tree service in Central NJ. Mid-market positioning: published pricing, 2-hour callback SLA, annual maintenance bundles.

services.name: Maintenance
services.description: Annual maintenance plans, pruning, mulching, irrigation

services.name: Snow Removal
services.description: Per-push and seasonal contract snow removal

about.headline: Local crews, transparent pricing, and jobs finished without the usual runaround.
about.story: R Brothers Outdoor Services helps Central New Jersey homeowners keep their properties sharp with practical plans, fair pricing, and fast communication from the first call to the last walkthrough.
about.team_intro: Our team handles weekly maintenance, cleanups, fencing, sod, and tree work with the same mindset: show up on time, explain the scope clearly, and leave the property better than we found it.
why_choose_us: Published pricing ranges so you know the ballpark before you call.
Fast callbacks that keep projects moving instead of dragging for days.
Seasonal service bundles designed to cut down on repeat hassle.

testimonials.quote: They answered quickly, showed up when they said they would, and the lawn has looked better every week since.
testimonials.author: Maria R., Edison

testimonials.quote: The cleanup and mulch install made the whole front yard look new without trying to upsell us on extras we didn't need.
testimonials.author: James T., Somerset County

testimonials.quote: Snow removal was reliable all winter and communication was better than any contractor we've used before.
testimonials.author: Nina P., Middlesex County

faq.question: Do you handle both one-time jobs and ongoing maintenance?
faq.answer: Yes. We handle seasonal cleanups, single installs, and recurring maintenance plans depending on the property and scope.

faq.question: Can you help plan the right service before I know exactly what I need?
faq.answer: Yes. Tell us what the property is dealing with and we can point you toward the right service or combination of services.

faq.question: Do you work across multiple Central New Jersey counties?
faq.answer: Yes. We regularly serve Middlesex, Monmouth, Somerset, and Union County properties.

faq.question: What is the best way to request a quote?
faq.answer: Call us directly for the fastest response or send the lead form with your preferred service and timing.

odoo_lead_form.title: Request a Fast Quote
odoo_lead_form.subtitle: Share a few details and our team will follow up with the right next step.
odoo_lead_form.sms_consent: I agree to receive text updates about my request. Reply STOP to opt out.

pain_points: Existing site doesn't convert — no pricing, no clear CTA
Competitors don't pick up the phone
No annual bundle offering to reduce churn
goals: Own the mid-market in Central NJ
Sell annual packages to maximize customer lifetime value
